title: Dillon's PVP texture PACK
description: this resource pack adds utils that can help enhance ur pvp skills!
body:
Dillon's Clean and Stylish Resource Pack

This sleek resource pack will make your Minecraft graphics look better! It makes small but important changes to the game that make it look cleaner and more fun without changing the way you play.

Features:

Unobtrusive particles and smaller utilities

Minimal totem pop animations and low fire effects

Transparent GUI and cleaner hotbar

Blue cobwebs, side shield, and custom viewmodels for bucket

Custom swords, bow, crossbow, and cleaner enchant glint

Ore borders for better block visibility

Perfect for players who want a cleaner, more stylish Minecraft experience.

Created by Dillon
